11105264528.text: you are in a maze, its dark. There are two paths ahead of you.
11105264528.left_option: turn left and walk through the vines
11105264528.right_option: go right and swim through the lake

11105264384.text: the vines give way to another fork in the path. theres light coming in through the bushes on the left
11105264384.left_option: try to crawl out of the maze through the bushes
11105264384.right_option: ignore the light and walk straight

11105264432.text: you made it out. you win

11105271632.text: you got further into the dark maze and reach a dead end. you dont know where to gp. you lost

11105264480.text: the lake has crocodiles. you have lsost
